ops.title: Auto-rewrite blocked guard commands + rg engine for ccx code grep (plan: ~/.cc-pool/accounts/acct-09/plans/error-blocked-raw-cheerful-trinket.md)

ops.text: v0.7.0 tagged on main with green CI; fresh session auto-rewrites 'grep -rn foo src/' and 'git diff' with notes; 'ccx code grep -i' returns case-insensitive hits
